payload.answer: Rejected. A normal user cannot execute admin SQL or delete memory cards via this command. No durable memory was created, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a command attempting privileged administrative SQL deletion, not a user memory fact to store.

details: Detected attempted admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
User role is normal user, not admin.
No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: If you intended to delete your own saved memories, use an authorized memory deletion workflow.
If this is a test fixture, verify that normal-user admin commands are denied without side effects.
